c74object.name: dk.gridscale
c74object.description: The dk.gridscale object allows you to scale and offset an XY grid-based space including gamepad-specific features like a definable deadzone and click-to-zoom. This is useful when paired with dk.gridmatch allowing you to use the full range of your controller to access and control a subspace within the overall space.
c74object.discussion: This is a useful utility for creating complex mappings using the gamepad object.

method.name: clear
method.digest: Clears any scaling and resets to default values
method.description: Clears any input and output scaling and resets to default values (0. 1. 0. 1.).

method.name: node
method.digest: Keyword identifier for control messages coming from nodes
method.description: Keyword identifier for control messages coming from nodes. This takes the control messages from the 2nd outlet of nodes.

attribute.name: curve
attribute.digest: Curve that is applied symmetrically each axis
attribute.description: Curve that is applied symmetrically each axis. Can be a two item list, which would set both sets or a four item list {x low, x high, y low, y high} for setting each X or Y independently.

attribute.name: deadzone
attribute.description: Defines deadzone amount, which is an area in the center of the range that is ignored. This is typically used for gamepad input (in %).

attribute.name: edgecase
attribute.digest: Defines what happens when input exceeds scaling
attribute.description: Defines what happens when input exceeds scaling. The options are ignore or clip Ignore will not pass out the XY list if it leaves the defined area whereas clip will clip values to the defined values.

attribute.name: transformation
attribute.description: Transforms input space by turning a circlular input (gamepad) into a square (circ2square) or by turning a square input (trackpad) into a circle (square2circ).

attribute.name: xyin
attribute.description: List consisting of input scaling. Can be a two item list, which would set both sets or a four item list {x low, x high, y low, y high} for setting each X or Y independently.

attribute.name: xyout
attribute.description: List consisting of output scaling. Can be a two item list, which would set both sets or a four item list {x low, x high, y low, y high} for setting each X or Y independently.

attribute.name: zoom
attribute.description: Engage temporary zooming in to a subset of the overall range. Inspired by sniper rifle zoom in in first person shooter games.

attribute.name: zoomamount
attribute.digest: Amount to zoom in with zoom attribute
attribute.description: Amount to zoom in with zoom attribute (in %).

attribute.name: zoomfadein
attribute.digest: Fade in time for zoom attribute
attribute.description: Fade in time for zoom attribute (in ms).

attribute.name: zoomfadeout
attribute.digest: Fade out time for zoom attribute
attribute.description: Fade out time for zoom attribute (in ms).
